method: Chrome MCP browser_batch — live site with ?preview_theme_id=186373570873
note: Screenshots captured in session context. Observations documented here. Re-run via Chrome MCP to regenerate images.

screenshots.label: Homepage
observations: BBI mega-menu nav renders correctly — 5 items visible
CONTENT-1 BUG: logo renders as text 'Brant BASICS Interiors' wordmark, not image
Hero section renders with background image
Artifact: 'HERO' label overlay visible in hero — likely a dev/editor artifact
Footer renders with 4-column layout and OECM trust band

screenshots.label: Seating category page
observations: BBI nav renders — 'Shop Furniture' tab shows active state
Hero image placeholder visible (no image set for seating hero)
Breadcrumb: Home > Business Furniture > Seating (3-level) — correct
CTA reads 'Get a free seating recommendation' — should be 'Shop all seating'
Category tile grid renders

screenshots.label: Highback Seating sub-collection
observations: BBI nav renders — but logo falls back to text 'Brant Business Interiors' (no logo image set for this template)
Breadcrumb: Home > Highback (Seating) — only 2 levels, missing Shop Furniture middle level
CTA reads 'Get a free quote' — should be category-appropriate
Product grid renders but all product images are empty placeholders
Shopify Chat widget from Starlite theme bleeding through (bottom-right corner) — Starlite app not suppressed on sub-collection pages

screenshots.label: In-stock PDP
observations: BBI nav renders correctly
Product photo renders ✅
Price: $562.79 visible
Stock label: 'IN STOCK — ORDER DIRECT'
'Request a Quote' CTA present
Trust line renders
Breadcrumb: Home > Desks & Workstations > Alphabetter Stand Up Desk — 3-level (should be 4: Home > Shop Furniture > Desks > Product)

screenshots.label: Quote-only PDP ($0 price)
observations: BBI nav renders correctly
Product photo renders ✅
PROJECT QUOTE block renders: 'Request a quote on this product' ✅
No price shown — correct for $0 showcase product
BBI rule #2 (unbuyable → quote CTA) confirmed working

screenshots.label: About page (DRAFT)
observations: Page returns 404 publicly — Shopify Page record exists but is DRAFT (published_at: null)
Starlite chrome renders: BrantBasics header visible above BBI 404 content
BBI custom 404 content ('Page not found' + search + category tiles) renders in body
Two-chrome bug: Starlite header + BBI 404 content = visual collision
Root cause: (1) page is DRAFT, (2) template=='404' missing from bbi_landing gate

screenshots.label: Customer Stories page (no Page record)
observations: Page returns 404 — Shopify Page record was never created (ROOT_CAUSE_404)
Dev theme has page.customer-stories.json template but no Page record with that handle
Starlite chrome renders above BBI 404 content — same two-chrome bug as above
CS-1 row in Wave G is not started, matching build-state

screenshots.label: Brands Keilhauer page (DRAFT)
observations: Page returns 404 publicly — Shopify Page record exists but is DRAFT
Dev theme has page.brands-keilhauer.json template + ds-lp-brands-keilhauer.liquid section
Starlite chrome renders above BBI 404 content — same two-chrome bug
All Wave C brand pages (brands, brands-keilhauer, brands-global-teknion, brands-ergocentric) are DRAFT

screenshots.label: Synthetic 404 page
observations: Confirms two-chrome bug on any 404: Starlite header renders above BBI custom 404 content
BBI 404 content renders correctly (search box + 4 category tiles + phone CTA)
Root cause: template=='404' not in bbi_landing gate in either worktree or dev theme
Fix: add 'or template == "404"' to bbi_landing gate in theme.liquid
issues: gate missing template=='404' — confirmed on live 404 responses

screenshots.label: Contact page (published, dev-only drift)
observations: BBI nav renders ✅ — gate includes contact suffix in dev theme
Logo appears compact / text fallback 'Brant * BI' — possible stale nav snippet
Nav labels visible: Shop | Industries | Brands | Services | About
Contact info renders correctly: phone, email, address
Contact template exists only in dev theme (page.contact.json + ds-lp-contact.liquid) — NOT in worktree git
OK_DEVONLY_DRIFT status confirmed
issues: Template only in dev theme, not committed to worktree git
